title: Add light/dark theme toggle and OCR 'Coming Soon' message

requirements.text: Add a light/dark theme toggle button in the top-right area of the app header (visible on all pages) that allows users to switch between light (white) and dark themes. The toggle should display an appropriate sun/moon icon. Persist the user's theme preference in localStorage under the key 'acadmind_theme' so it is restored on next visit. Wire the toggle to the existing ThemeProvider in App.tsx and the CSS custom properties already defined in frontend/src/index.css for light and dark modes.

quotes: can you give it theme button on right top so that user can shift white and dark theme

acceptanceCriteria: A theme toggle button (sun/moon icon) is visible in the top-right corner of the app on all pages
Clicking the button switches the app between light and dark themes
The active theme is persisted in localStorage under 'acadmind_theme'
On page reload, the previously selected theme is restored automatically
Dark mode applies the dark CSS custom properties defined in frontend/src/index.css consistently across all pages and components
The toggle button itself is styled to remain visible and accessible in both light and dark themes

requirements.text: In frontend/src/pages/TimetableUpload.tsx, replace any text or error message that currently displays 'No' (or a negative/error response) when the user clicks the 'Extract Timetable' / OCR button with a clearly styled 'Coming Soon' message. The message should inform the user that this feature is not yet available, displayed inline where the result would normally appear. Do not show any error or 'No' text in this context.

quotes: on ocr page don't ocr write no when user click write coming soon

acceptanceCriteria: When the user clicks the 'Extract Timetable' button on the OCR Upload page, no 'No' or negative error text is shown
Instead, a 'Coming Soon' message is displayed inline in the result area
The 'Coming Soon' message is clearly readable and styled consistently with the app theme
The loading spinner (if shown) still appears briefly before the 'Coming Soon' message is displayed
No other functionality on the TimetableUpload page is altered

constraints: Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
The theme toggle must use the existing CSS custom properties and ThemeProvider already present in the codebase
Do not alter any other functionality on the TimetableUpload page beyond replacing the 'No' text with 'Coming Soon'
nonGoals: Changing the overall layout or navigation structure
Implementing actual OCR functionality on the TimetableUpload page
